title: stelis papillifera
intro: Stelis papillifera is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the hairy stelis. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis papillifera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Stelis papillifera typically involve boiling the roots in water or infusing them in tea to utilize its medicinal properties.
